title: Weak Authentication Mechanisms
description: The system lacks detailed authentication and authorization information, making it vulnerable to attackers bypassing authentication mechanisms. Without robust multi-factor authentication (MFA) and strong password policies, attackers could potentially impersonate legitimate users and gain unauthorized access to sensitive data and system resources.
attack_vector: Credential stuffing, brute-force attacks, phishing, or exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication protocol (e.g., weak session management).
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Regularly review and update authentication protocols to address known vulnerabilities.
